description_long: This is a finely detailed marble bust of a bearded man, depicted from the chest up and adorned with a ceremonial chain and medallion draped across his shoulders. The sculpture features realistic facial details, including a full beard, mustache, and carefully rendered hair, with a stern, dignified expression. The attire suggests formal or official status, with a collared shirt and jacket beneath the ornate chain. The bust is mounted on a rectangular stone base, providing stability and a sense of permanence. The back of the sculpture is smoothly finished, with the chain motif continuing around the shoulders. The overall craftsmanship and material suggest it is intended as a commemorative or honorific public artwork.
description: A marble bust of a bearded man wearing a ceremonial chain and medallion, mounted on a stone base with detailed facial features and formal attire.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the man's face, beard, ceremonial chain, and medallion in full detail.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the depth of the beard, the ear, and the side of the ceremonial chain.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the continuation of the chain motif across the back.
description_view_3: Right profile view showing the side of the face, beard, and the drape of the chain over the shoulder.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure, bearded man in ceremonial attire
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is isolated and white.
